god_revive_snake.effect: cost of resurrection varies depending on how much the final form given to the target resembles a snake, from 10% increase in cost to 25% reduction. this does not take into account the original form of the target, only the form they are being ressurected as.

1.name: death defier
1.effect: once a week, when at full health, an attack that would kill the user instantly instead leaves them at 1HP

2.name: death defier II
2.effect: same effect as the previous level, but cooldown changed to once a day

3.name: death defier III
3.effect: same effect as the previous level, but applies to the soul as well

4.name: death defier IV
4.effect: same effect as the previous level, but cooldown removed, it now applies at all times the user recieves a killing blow at full HP
4.method: aquire a way to consistently defy death

roumoured.name: roumoured
roumoured.method: be the subject of various roumours

famous.method: be widely known in a community

split_fables.name: split fables
